channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Kodak EC35 is a dirt-cheap point-and-shoot film camera
item.description: Following the success of its $99 Kodak-branded Snapic A1, Reto Project is releasing the Kodak EC35, an even more affordable 35mm film camera for just $34.99. The EC35 certainly isn't fancy. Its 25mm acrylic lens with a fixed f/10 aperture and 1/100 shutter speed basically put it on par with a drugstore disposable. The fact […]

item.title: Can an Apple lawsuit derail OpenAI’s hardware plans?
item.description: On the latest episode of Equity, we debate whether Apple's lawsuit will cast over OpenAi's much-discussed plans to get into hardware and go public.

item.title: NASA shares beautiful timelapse of the Psyche spacecraft's view over Mars
item.description: The spacecraft made a close approach to the red planet in May on its way to explore the asteroid it's named after.

item.title: Chipotle is giving away free entrées during the World Cup final — how to claim yours
item.description: Chipotle is giving away 100,000 free entrees during the 2026 World Cup final. Here’s how to watch for the code and claim your free food.
